name: main.ato
content:
"""
MatrixRevA — top level. FirstLight FL-1 relay/probe matrix Rev A.

Composition (relay-probe-matrix-rev-a.md): cartridge interface ->
8x probe protection -> 8x lane-selector matrix -> instrument connectors;
RP2040 control + coil sinks + watchdog; reference block for self-cal.
Connector map per spec section 7 (J1/J2/J10/J20-J25).
"""

import ElectricPower
from "power.ato" import PowerTree
from "matrix.ato" import Matrix
from "protection.ato" import ProbeProtection
from "protection.ato" import ReferenceBlock
from "mcu.ato" import Control
from "cartridge.ato" import CartridgeInterface
from "parts/Header_1x02/Header_1x02.ato" import Header_1x02_package
from "parts/Header_1x04/Header_1x04.ato" import Header_1x04_package
from "parts/Header_1x08/Header_1x08.ato" import Header_1x08_package


module MatrixRevA:
    power = new PowerTree
    ctl = new Control
    cart = new CartridgeInterface
    matrix = new Matrix
    refs = new ReferenceBlock

    prot_p1 = new ProbeProtection
    prot_p2 = new ProbeProtection
    prot_p3 = new ProbeProtection
    prot_p4 = new ProbeProtection
    prot_kfp = new ProbeProtection
    prot_kfn = new ProbeProtection
    prot_ksp = new ProbeProtection
    prot_ksn = new ProbeProtection

    # connectors
    j2_24v = new Header_1x02_package
    j20_scope_a = new Header_1x02_package
    j21_scope_b = new Header_1x02_package
    j22_dmm = new Header_1x04_package
    j23_daq_logic = new Header_1x08_package
    j24_pwr_inj = new Header_1x02_package

    # power
    j2_24v.p1 ~ power.v24.hv
    j2_24v.p2 ~ power.v24.lv
    ctl.v3v3 ~ power.v3v3_dig
    ctl.v5_coil ~ power.v5_coil
    cart.v3v3 ~ power.v3v3_dig
    refs.v3v3 ~ power.v3v3_ana
    matrix.coil_bus ~ power.v5_coil

    # I2C bus: MCU <-> coil monitor + cal EEPROM + cartridge EEPROM
    ctl.sda ~ cart.sda
    ctl.scl ~ cart.scl

    # tip -> protection -> selector
    cart.tip_p1 ~ prot_p1.tip
    cart.tip_p2 ~ prot_p2.tip
    cart.tip_p3 ~ prot_p3.tip
    cart.tip_p4 ~ prot_p4.tip
    cart.tip_kf_p ~ prot_kfp.tip
    cart.tip_kf_n ~ prot_kfn.tip
    cart.tip_ks_p ~ prot_ksp.tip
    cart.tip_ks_n ~ prot_ksn.tip
    prot_p1.node ~ matrix.sel_p1.probe
    prot_p2.node ~ matrix.sel_p2.probe
    prot_p3.node ~ matrix.sel_p3.probe
    prot_p4.node ~ matrix.sel_p4.probe
    prot_kfp.node ~ matrix.sel_kfp.probe
    prot_kfn.node ~ matrix.sel_kfn.probe
    prot_ksp.node ~ matrix.sel_ksp.probe
    prot_ksn.node ~ matrix.sel_ksn.probe

    # protection rails (clamp rails from analog supply; -15V TBD Rev A
    # bring-up: single +15/-15 charge pump or external — leave net stubs)
    prot_p1.v3v3 ~ power.v3v3_ana
    prot_p2.v3v3 ~ power.v3v3_ana
    prot_p3.v3v3 ~ power.v3v3_ana
    prot_p4.v3v3 ~ power.v3v3_ana
    prot_kfp.v3v3 ~ power.v3v3_ana
    prot_kfn.v3v3 ~ power.v3v3_ana
    prot_ksp.v3v3 ~ power.v3v3_ana
    prot_ksn.v3v3 ~ power.v3v3_ana

    # lane buses -> instrument connectors
    matrix.scope_a ~ j20_scope_a.p1
    matrix.scope_b ~ j21_scope_b.p1
    matrix.dmm_hi ~ j22_dmm.p1
    matrix.dmm_lo ~ j22_dmm.p2
    matrix.daq_1 ~ j23_daq_logic.p1
    matrix.daq_2 ~ j23_daq_logic.p2
    matrix.logic_1 ~ j23_daq_logic.p3
    matrix.logic_2 ~ j23_daq_logic.p4
    matrix.pwr_inj ~ j24_pwr_inj.p1
    j24_pwr_inj.p2 ~ power.v24.lv
    matrix.gnd_ref ~ power.v24.lv

    # reference block rides the DMM_HI lane
    refs.ref_bus ~ matrix.dmm_hi

    # coil channel map v2 — LOCALITY: TPIC 1-8 sit atop tree 1-8 and
    # sink that tree's 8 G6K coils; TPIC 9-11 sink the reed bank;
    # TPIC 12 sinks the reference block. Firmware shares this table.
    matrix.sink_p1_bank ~ ctl.drain1
    matrix.sink_p1_scope_a ~ ctl.drain2
    matrix.sink_p1_scope_b ~ ctl.drain3
    matrix.sink_p1_daq_1 ~ ctl.drain4
    matrix.sink_p1_daq_2 ~ ctl.drain5
    matrix.sink_p1_logic_1 ~ ctl.drain6
    matrix.sink_p1_logic_2 ~ ctl.drain7
    matrix.sink_p1_pwr ~ ctl.drain8
    matrix.sink_p2_bank ~ ctl.drain9
    matrix.sink_p2_scope_a ~ ctl.drain10
    matrix.sink_p2_scope_b ~ ctl.drain11
    matrix.sink_p2_daq_1 ~ ctl.drain12
    matrix.sink_p2_daq_2 ~ ctl.drain13
    matrix.sink_p2_logic_1 ~ ctl.drain14
    matrix.sink_p2_logic_2 ~ ctl.drain15
    matrix.sink_p2_pwr ~ ctl.drain16
    matrix.sink_p3_bank ~ ctl.drain17
    matrix.sink_p3_scope_a ~ ctl.drain18
    matrix.sink_p3_scope_b ~ ctl.drain19
    matrix.sink_p3_daq_1 ~ ctl.drain20
    matrix.sink_p3_daq_2 ~ ctl.drain21
    matrix.sink_p3_logic_1 ~ ctl.drain22
    matrix.sink_p3_logic_2 ~ ctl.drain23
    matrix.sink_p3_pwr ~ ctl.drain24
    matrix.sink_p4_bank ~ ctl.drain25
    matrix.sink_p4_scope_a ~ ctl.drain26
    matrix.sink_p4_scope_b ~ ctl.drain27
    matrix.sink_p4_daq_1 ~ ctl.drain28
    matrix.sink_p4_daq_2 ~ ctl.drain29
    matrix.sink_p4_logic_1 ~ ctl.drain30
    matrix.sink_p4_logic_2 ~ ctl.drain31
    matrix.sink_p4_pwr ~ ctl.drain32
    matrix.sink_kfp_bank ~ ctl.drain33
    matrix.sink_kfp_scope_a ~ ctl.drain34
    matrix.sink_kfp_scope_b ~ ctl.drain35
    matrix.sink_kfp_daq_1 ~ ctl.drain36
    matrix.sink_kfp_daq_2 ~ ctl.drain37
    matrix.sink_kfp_logic_1 ~ ctl.drain38
    matrix.sink_kfp_logic_2 ~ ctl.drain39
    matrix.sink_kfp_pwr ~ ctl.drain40
    matrix.sink_kfn_bank ~ ctl.drain41
    matrix.sink_kfn_scope_a ~ ctl.drain42
    matrix.sink_kfn_scope_b ~ ctl.drain43
    matrix.sink_kfn_daq_1 ~ ctl.drain44
    matrix.sink_kfn_daq_2 ~ ctl.drain45
    matrix.sink_kfn_logic_1 ~ ctl.drain46
    matrix.sink_kfn_logic_2 ~ ctl.drain47
    matrix.sink_kfn_pwr ~ ctl.drain48
    matrix.sink_ksp_bank ~ ctl.drain49
    matrix.sink_ksp_scope_a ~ ctl.drain50
    matrix.sink_ksp_scope_b ~ ctl.drain51
    matrix.sink_ksp_daq_1 ~ ctl.drain52
    matrix.sink_ksp_daq_2 ~ ctl.drain53
    matrix.sink_ksp_logic_1 ~ ctl.drain54
    matrix.sink_ksp_logic_2 ~ ctl.drain55
    matrix.sink_ksp_pwr ~ ctl.drain56
    matrix.sink_ksn_bank ~ ctl.drain57
    matrix.sink_ksn_scope_a ~ ctl.drain58
    matrix.sink_ksn_scope_b ~ ctl.drain59
    matrix.sink_ksn_daq_1 ~ ctl.drain60
    matrix.sink_ksn_daq_2 ~ ctl.drain61
    matrix.sink_ksn_logic_1 ~ ctl.drain62
    matrix.sink_ksn_logic_2 ~ ctl.drain63
    matrix.sink_ksn_pwr ~ ctl.drain64
    matrix.sink_p1_dmm_hi ~ ctl.drain65
    matrix.sink_p1_dmm_lo ~ ctl.drain66
    matrix.sink_p1_gnd ~ ctl.drain67
    matrix.sink_p2_dmm_hi ~ ctl.drain68
    matrix.sink_p2_dmm_lo ~ ctl.drain69
    matrix.sink_p2_gnd ~ ctl.drain70
    matrix.sink_p3_dmm_hi ~ ctl.drain71
    matrix.sink_p3_dmm_lo ~ ctl.drain72
    matrix.sink_p3_gnd ~ ctl.drain73
    matrix.sink_p4_dmm_hi ~ ctl.drain74
    matrix.sink_p4_dmm_lo ~ ctl.drain75
    matrix.sink_p4_gnd ~ ctl.drain76
    matrix.sink_kfp_dmm_hi ~ ctl.drain77
    matrix.sink_kfp_dmm_lo ~ ctl.drain78
    matrix.sink_kfp_gnd ~ ctl.drain79
    matrix.sink_kfn_dmm_hi ~ ctl.drain80
    matrix.sink_kfn_dmm_lo ~ ctl.drain81
    matrix.sink_kfn_gnd ~ ctl.drain82
    matrix.sink_ksp_dmm_hi ~ ctl.drain83
    matrix.sink_ksp_dmm_lo ~ ctl.drain84
    matrix.sink_ksp_gnd ~ ctl.drain85
    matrix.sink_ksn_dmm_hi ~ ctl.drain86
    matrix.sink_ksn_dmm_lo ~ ctl.drain87
    matrix.sink_ksn_gnd ~ ctl.drain88
    refs.sink_1k ~ ctl.drain89
    refs.sink_100k ~ ctl.drain90
    refs.sink_short ~ ctl.drain91

name: cartridge.ato
content:
"""
Cartridge interface — J10 blind-mate per the contract
(relay-probe-matrix-rev-a.md sections 4 + 7):
8 signal contacts (P1-P4, KF+/-, KS+/-) + 2 guard + I2C (cartridge ID
EEPROM lives ON the cartridge) + presence detect + chassis. The 200 MHz
scope cartridge coax does NOT enter this connector (J11 MMCX bypass,
off-board).
"""

import ElectricPower
import Resistor
from "parts/Samtec_SEAF14/Samtec_SEAF14.ato" import Samtec_SEAF14_package


module CartridgeInterface:
    signal tip_p1
    signal tip_p2
    signal tip_p3
    signal tip_p4
    signal tip_kf_p
    signal tip_kf_n
    signal tip_ks_p
    signal tip_ks_n
    signal present_n
    signal sda
    signal scl
    signal guard
    v3v3 = new ElectricPower

    j10 = new Samtec_SEAF14_package
    r_pullup = new Resistor
    r_pullup.resistance = 10kohm +/- 5%
    r_pullup.package = "0402"

    j10.1 ~ tip_p1
    j10.2 ~ tip_p2
    j10.3 ~ tip_p3
    j10.4 ~ tip_p4
    j10.5 ~ tip_kf_p
    j10.6 ~ tip_kf_n
    j10.7 ~ tip_ks_p
    j10.8 ~ tip_ks_n
    j10.9 ~ guard
    j10.10 ~ guard
    j10.11 ~ sda
    j10.12 ~ scl
    j10.14 ~ v3v3.lv

    # presence: grounded loop on cartridge side, pull-up here
    j10.13 ~ present_n
    present_n ~ r_pullup.unnamed[0]
    r_pullup.unnamed[1] ~ v3v3.hv

name: matrix.ato
content:
"""
Matrix — per-probe 1-of-10 lane selector trees.

8 probe resources (P1-P4, KF+/-, KS+/-) x 10 instrument lanes.
Topology per relay-probe-matrix-rev-a.md section 2: one LaneSelector
tree per probe (~11 relays), 88 relays total.

Real parts (verified pinouts):
- General lanes: Omron G6K-2F-Y-TR DC5 (LCSC C47190). Datasheet terminal
  arrangement (TOP VIEW): coil 1(+)/8(-); pole1 COM=3 NC=2 NO=4;
  pole2 COM=6 NC=7 NO=5. Pole 1 used; pole 2 spare.
- Precision lanes: PAN CHANG SIP-1A05 reed (LCSC C10496) as Rev A
  bring-up substitute for the spec'd Coto/Pickering shielded reed
  (unshielded, no thermal-EMF matching — production part TBD).
  EasyEDA symbol: coil pins 5/7, Form-A switch pins 1/3.
All relays default-open; coil sinks are TPIC6B595 channels (mcu.ato).
"""

import ElectricPower
from "parts/Omron_Electronics_G6K_2F_Y_TR_DC5/Omron_Electronics_G6K_2F_Y_TR_DC5.ato" import Omron_Electronics_G6K_2F_Y_TR_DC5_package
from "parts/PAN_CHANG_SIP_1A05/PAN_CHANG_SIP_1A05.ato" import PAN_CHANG_SIP_1A05_package





module LaneSelector:
    """One probe resource -> one of 10 lanes. Stage 1 splits probe to
    general/precision bank; stage 2 selects the lane. Reeds carry the
    precision bank (DMM_HI/LO + GND_REF discharge path)."""
    signal probe
    signal scope_a
    signal scope_b
    signal daq_1
    signal daq_2
    signal logic_1
    signal logic_2
    signal pwr_inj
    signal dmm_hi
    signal dmm_lo
    signal gnd_ref
    coil_bus = new ElectricPower
    signal sink_bank
    signal sink_scope_a
    signal sink_scope_b
    signal sink_daq_1
    signal sink_daq_2
    signal sink_logic_1
    signal sink_logic_2
    signal sink_pwr
    signal sink_dmm_hi
    signal sink_dmm_lo
    signal sink_gnd

    k_bank = new Omron_Electronics_G6K_2F_Y_TR_DC5_package
    k_scope_a = new Omron_Electronics_G6K_2F_Y_TR_DC5_package
    k_scope_b = new Omron_Electronics_G6K_2F_Y_TR_DC5_package
    k_daq_1 = new Omron_Electronics_G6K_2F_Y_TR_DC5_package
    k_daq_2 = new Omron_Electronics_G6K_2F_Y_TR_DC5_package
    k_logic_1 = new Omron_Electronics_G6K_2F_Y_TR_DC5_package
    k_logic_2 = new Omron_Electronics_G6K_2F_Y_TR_DC5_package
    k_pwr = new Omron_Electronics_G6K_2F_Y_TR_DC5_package
    k_dmm_hi = new PAN_CHANG_SIP_1A05_package
    k_dmm_lo = new PAN_CHANG_SIP_1A05_package
    k_gnd = new PAN_CHANG_SIP_1A05_package

    # coil+ rail; coil- sinks land per-channel in mcu.ato (TPIC drains)
    k_bank.coil_p ~ coil_bus.hv
    k_scope_a.coil_p ~ coil_bus.hv
    k_scope_b.coil_p ~ coil_bus.hv
    k_daq_1.coil_p ~ coil_bus.hv
    k_daq_2.coil_p ~ coil_bus.hv
    k_logic_1.coil_p ~ coil_bus.hv
    k_logic_2.coil_p ~ coil_bus.hv
    k_pwr.coil_p ~ coil_bus.hv
    k_dmm_hi.coil_p ~ coil_bus.hv
    k_dmm_lo.coil_p ~ coil_bus.hv
    k_gnd.coil_p ~ coil_bus.hv

    k_bank.coil_n ~ sink_bank
    k_scope_a.coil_n ~ sink_scope_a
    k_scope_b.coil_n ~ sink_scope_b
    k_daq_1.coil_n ~ sink_daq_1
    k_daq_2.coil_n ~ sink_daq_2
    k_logic_1.coil_n ~ sink_logic_1
    k_logic_2.coil_n ~ sink_logic_2
    k_pwr.coil_n ~ sink_pwr
    k_dmm_hi.coil_n ~ sink_dmm_hi
    k_dmm_lo.coil_n ~ sink_dmm_lo
    k_gnd.coil_n ~ sink_gnd

    probe ~ k_bank.com
    k_bank.nc ~ k_scope_a.com
    k_bank.nc ~ k_scope_b.com
    k_bank.nc ~ k_daq_1.com
    k_bank.nc ~ k_daq_2.com
    k_bank.nc ~ k_logic_1.com
    k_bank.nc ~ k_logic_2.com
    k_bank.nc ~ k_pwr.com
    k_bank.no ~ k_dmm_hi.com
    k_bank.no ~ k_dmm_lo.com
    k_bank.no ~ k_gnd.com

    k_scope_a.no ~ scope_a
    k_scope_b.no ~ scope_b
    k_daq_1.no ~ daq_1
    k_daq_2.no ~ daq_2
    k_logic_1.no ~ logic_1
    k_logic_2.no ~ logic_2
    k_pwr.no ~ pwr_inj
    k_dmm_hi.no ~ dmm_hi
    k_dmm_lo.no ~ dmm_lo
    k_gnd.no ~ gnd_ref


module Matrix:
    """8 selector trees + the shared lane buses."""
    signal scope_a
    signal scope_b
    signal daq_1
    signal daq_2
    signal logic_1
    signal logic_2
    signal pwr_inj
    signal dmm_hi
    signal dmm_lo
    signal gnd_ref
    coil_bus = new ElectricPower
    signal sink_p1_bank
    signal sink_p1_scope_a
    signal sink_p1_scope_b
    signal sink_p1_daq_1
    signal sink_p1_daq_2
    signal sink_p1_logic_1
    signal sink_p1_logic_2
    signal sink_p1_pwr
    signal sink_p1_dmm_hi
    signal sink_p1_dmm_lo
    signal sink_p1_gnd
    signal sink_p2_bank
    signal sink_p2_scope_a
    signal sink_p2_scope_b
    signal sink_p2_daq_1
    signal sink_p2_daq_2
    signal sink_p2_logic_1
    signal sink_p2_logic_2
    signal sink_p2_pwr
    signal sink_p2_dmm_hi
    signal sink_p2_dmm_lo
    signal sink_p2_gnd
    signal sink_p3_bank
    signal sink_p3_scope_a
    signal sink_p3_scope_b
    signal sink_p3_daq_1
    signal sink_p3_daq_2
    signal sink_p3_logic_1
    signal sink_p3_logic_2
    signal sink_p3_pwr
    signal sink_p3_dmm_hi
    signal sink_p3_dmm_lo
    signal sink_p3_gnd
    signal sink_p4_bank
    signal sink_p4_scope_a
    signal sink_p4_scope_b
    signal sink_p4_daq_1
    signal sink_p4_daq_2
    signal sink_p4_logic_1
    signal sink_p4_logic_2
    signal sink_p4_pwr
    signal sink_p4_dmm_hi
    signal sink_p4_dmm_lo
    signal sink_p4_gnd
    signal sink_kfp_bank
    signal sink_kfp_scope_a
    signal sink_kfp_scope_b
    signal sink_kfp_daq_1
    signal sink_kfp_daq_2
    signal sink_kfp_logic_1
    signal sink_kfp_logic_2
    signal sink_kfp_pwr
    signal sink_kfp_dmm_hi
    signal sink_kfp_dmm_lo
    signal sink_kfp_gnd
    signal sink_kfn_bank
    signal sink_kfn_scope_a
    signal sink_kfn_scope_b
    signal sink_kfn_daq_1
    signal sink_kfn_daq_2
    signal sink_kfn_logic_1
    signal sink_kfn_logic_2
    signal sink_kfn_pwr
    signal sink_kfn_dmm_hi
    signal sink_kfn_dmm_lo
    signal sink_kfn_gnd
    signal sink_ksp_bank
    signal sink_ksp_scope_a
    signal sink_ksp_scope_b
    signal sink_ksp_daq_1
    signal sink_ksp_daq_2
    signal sink_ksp_logic_1
    signal sink_ksp_logic_2
    signal sink_ksp_pwr
    signal sink_ksp_dmm_hi
    signal sink_ksp_dmm_lo
    signal sink_ksp_gnd
    signal sink_ksn_bank
    signal sink_ksn_scope_a
    signal sink_ksn_scope_b
    signal sink_ksn_daq_1
    signal sink_ksn_daq_2
    signal sink_ksn_logic_1
    signal sink_ksn_logic_2
    signal sink_ksn_pwr
    signal sink_ksn_dmm_hi
    signal sink_ksn_dmm_lo
    signal sink_ksn_gnd

    sel_p1 = new LaneSelector
    sel_p2 = new LaneSelector
    sel_p3 = new LaneSelector
    sel_p4 = new LaneSelector
    sel_kfp = new LaneSelector
    sel_kfn = new LaneSelector
    sel_ksp = new LaneSelector
    sel_ksn = new LaneSelector

    sel_p1.sink_bank ~ sink_p1_bank
    sel_p1.sink_scope_a ~ sink_p1_scope_a
    sel_p1.sink_scope_b ~ sink_p1_scope_b
    sel_p1.sink_daq_1 ~ sink_p1_daq_1
    sel_p1.sink_daq_2 ~ sink_p1_daq_2
    sel_p1.sink_logic_1 ~ sink_p1_logic_1
    sel_p1.sink_logic_2 ~ sink_p1_logic_2
    sel_p1.sink_pwr ~ sink_p1_pwr
    sel_p1.sink_dmm_hi ~ sink_p1_dmm_hi
    sel_p1.sink_dmm_lo ~ sink_p1_dmm_lo
    sel_p1.sink_gnd ~ sink_p1_gnd
    sel_p2.sink_bank ~ sink_p2_bank
    sel_p2.sink_scope_a ~ sink_p2_scope_a
    sel_p2.sink_scope_b ~ sink_p2_scope_b
    sel_p2.sink_daq_1 ~ sink_p2_daq_1
    sel_p2.sink_daq_2 ~ sink_p2_daq_2
    sel_p2.sink_logic_1 ~ sink_p2_logic_1
    sel_p2.sink_logic_2 ~ sink_p2_logic_2
    sel_p2.sink_pwr ~ sink_p2_pwr
    sel_p2.sink_dmm_hi ~ sink_p2_dmm_hi
    sel_p2.sink_dmm_lo ~ sink_p2_dmm_lo
    sel_p2.sink_gnd ~ sink_p2_gnd
    sel_p3.sink_bank ~ sink_p3_bank
    sel_p3.sink_scope_a ~ sink_p3_scope_a
    sel_p3.sink_scope_b ~ sink_p3_scope_b
    sel_p3.sink_daq_1 ~ sink_p3_daq_1
    sel_p3.sink_daq_2 ~ sink_p3_daq_2
    sel_p3.sink_logic_1 ~ sink_p3_logic_1
    sel_p3.sink_logic_2 ~ sink_p3_logic_2
    sel_p3.sink_pwr ~ sink_p3_pwr
    sel_p3.sink_dmm_hi ~ sink_p3_dmm_hi
    sel_p3.sink_dmm_lo ~ sink_p3_dmm_lo
    sel_p3.sink_gnd ~ sink_p3_gnd
    sel_p4.sink_bank ~ sink_p4_bank
    sel_p4.sink_scope_a ~ sink_p4_scope_a
    sel_p4.sink_scope_b ~ sink_p4_scope_b
    sel_p4.sink_daq_1 ~ sink_p4_daq_1
    sel_p4.sink_daq_2 ~ sink_p4_daq_2
    sel_p4.sink_logic_1 ~ sink_p4_logic_1
    sel_p4.sink_logic_2 ~ sink_p4_logic_2
    sel_p4.sink_pwr ~ sink_p4_pwr
    sel_p4.sink_dmm_hi ~ sink_p4_dmm_hi
    sel_p4.sink_dmm_lo ~ sink_p4_dmm_lo
    sel_p4.sink_gnd ~ sink_p4_gnd
    sel_kfp.sink_bank ~ sink_kfp_bank
    sel_kfp.sink_scope_a ~ sink_kfp_scope_a
    sel_kfp.sink_scope_b ~ sink_kfp_scope_b
    sel_kfp.sink_daq_1 ~ sink_kfp_daq_1
    sel_kfp.sink_daq_2 ~ sink_kfp_daq_2
    sel_kfp.sink_logic_1 ~ sink_kfp_logic_1
    sel_kfp.sink_logic_2 ~ sink_kfp_logic_2

name: mcu.ato
content:
"""
Control — Raspberry Pi Pico 2 module (socketed) + TPIC6B595 coil-sink
chain + watchdog. Real parts: TPIC6B595DWR, TPS3823-33DBVR,
24AA025UIDT-I/OT (verified generated pinouts).

Pico module is not an LCSC part — stays a local component (footprint in
the floorplan board); bind as a local atomic part at layout sync.
Watchdog drops all coil power if the control link goes silent >250 ms.
91 coil channels (88 matrix + 3 reference block) = 12x TPIC6B595.
"""

import ElectricPower
from "parts/Texas_Instruments_TPIC6B595DWR/Texas_Instruments_TPIC6B595DWR.ato" import Texas_Instruments_TPIC6B595DWR_package
from "parts/Texas_Instruments_TPS3823_33DBVR/Texas_Instruments_TPS3823_33DBVR.ato" import Texas_Instruments_TPS3823_33DBVR_package
from "parts/Microchip_Tech_24AA025UIDT_I_OT/Microchip_Tech_24AA025UIDT_I_OT.ato" import Microchip_Tech_24AA025UIDT_I_OT_package
from "parts/RaspberryPi_Pico2/RaspberryPi_Pico2.ato" import RaspberryPi_Pico2_package


module Control:
    v3v3 = new ElectricPower
    v5_coil = new ElectricPower
    signal sda
    signal scl
    signal drain1
    signal drain2
    signal drain3
    signal drain4
    signal drain5
    signal drain6
    signal drain7
    signal drain8
    signal drain9
    signal drain10
    signal drain11
    signal drain12
    signal drain13
    signal drain14
    signal drain15
    signal drain16
    signal drain17
    signal drain18
    signal drain19
    signal drain20
    signal drain21
    signal drain22
    signal drain23
    signal drain24
    signal drain25

    signal drain27

    signal drain29
    signal drain30

    signal drain33
    signal drain34

    signal drain36

    signal drain45

    signal drain47
    signal drain48
    signal drain49
    signal drain50
    signal drain51
    signal drain52
    signal drain53
    signal drain54
    signal drain55
    signal drain56
    signal drain57
    signal drain58
    signal drain59
    signal drain60
    signal drain61
    signal drain62
    signal drain63
    signal drain64
    signal drain65
    signal drain66
    signal drain67
    signal drain68
    signal drain69
    signal drain70
    signal drain71
    signal drain72
    signal drain73
    signal drain74
    signal drain75
    signal drain76
    signal drain77
    signal drain78

    signal drain80
    signal drain81
    signal drain82
    signal drain83

    signal drain85
    signal drain86
    signal drain87
    signal drain88
    signal drain89
    signal drain90
    signal drain91
    signal drain92
    signal drain93
    signal drain94
    signal drain95
    signal drain96

    mcu = new RaspberryPi_Pico2_package
    wdt = new Texas_Instruments_TPS3823_33DBVR_package
    cal_eeprom = new Microchip_Tech_24AA025UIDT_I_OT_package

    sr1 = new Texas_Instruments_TPIC6B595DWR_package
    sr2 = new Texas_Instruments_TPIC6B595DWR_package
    sr3 = new Texas_Instruments_TPIC6B595DWR_package
    sr4 = new Texas_Instruments_TPIC6B595DWR_package
    sr5 = new Texas_Instruments_TPIC6B595DWR_package
    sr6 = new Texas_Instruments_TPIC6B595DWR_package
    sr7 = new Texas_Instruments_TPIC6B595DWR_package
    sr8 = new Texas_Instruments_TPIC6B595DWR_package
    sr9 = new Texas_Instruments_TPIC6B595DWR_package
    sr10 = new Texas_Instruments_TPIC6B595DWR_package
    sr11 = new Texas_Instruments_TPIC6B595DWR_package
    sr12 = new Texas_Instruments_TPIC6B595DWR_package

    mcu.vsys ~ v3v3.hv
    mcu.gnd ~ v3v3.lv

    mcu.sda ~ sda
    mcu.scl ~ scl
    cal_eeprom.VCC ~ v3v3.hv
    cal_eeprom.VSS ~ v3v3.lv
    cal_eeprom.SDA ~ sda
    cal_eeprom.SCL ~ scl
    cal_eeprom.A0 ~ v3v3.lv
    cal_eeprom.A1 ~ v3v3.lv

    wdt.VDD ~ v3v3.hv
    wdt.GND ~ v3v3.lv
    wdt.WDI ~ mcu.wdi
    wdt.nRESET ~ mcu.oe_n   # watchdog timeout -> sinks disabled -> all open
    wdt.nMR ~ v3v3.hv

    sr1.SERIN ~ mcu.spi_mosi
    sr1.SEROUT ~ sr2.SERIN
    sr2.SEROUT ~ sr3.SERIN
    sr3.SEROUT ~ sr4.SERIN
    sr4.SEROUT ~ sr5.SERIN
    sr5.SEROUT ~ sr6.SERIN
    sr6.SEROUT ~ sr7.SERIN
    sr7.SEROUT ~ sr8.SERIN
    sr8.SEROUT ~ sr9.SERIN
    sr9.SEROUT ~ sr10.SERIN
    sr10.SEROUT ~ sr11.SERIN
    sr11.SEROUT ~ sr12.SERIN
    sr1.SRCK ~ mcu.spi_sck
    sr2.SRCK ~ mcu.spi_sck
    sr3.SRCK ~ mcu.spi_sck
    sr4.SRCK ~ mcu.spi_sck
    sr5.SRCK ~ mcu.spi_sck
    sr6.SRCK ~ mcu.spi_sck
    sr7.SRCK ~ mcu.spi_sck
    sr8.SRCK ~ mcu.spi_sck
    sr9.SRCK ~ mcu.spi_sck
    sr10.SRCK ~ mcu.spi_sck
    sr11.SRCK ~ mcu.spi_sck
    sr12.SRCK ~ mcu.spi_sck
    sr1.RCK ~ mcu.latch
    sr2.RCK ~ mcu.latch
    sr3.RCK ~ mcu.latch
    sr4.RCK ~ mcu.latch
    sr5.RCK ~ mcu.latch
    sr6.RCK ~ mcu.latch
    sr7.RCK ~ mcu.latch
    sr8.RCK ~ mcu.latch
    sr9.RCK ~ mcu.latch
    sr10.RCK ~ mcu.latch
    sr11.RCK ~ mcu.latch
    sr12.RCK ~ mcu.latch
    sr1.nG ~ mcu.oe_n
    sr2.nG ~ mcu.oe_n
    sr3.nG ~ mcu.oe_n
    sr4.nG ~ mcu.oe_n
    sr5.nG ~ mcu.oe_n
    sr6.nG ~ mcu.oe_n
    sr7.nG ~ mcu.oe_n
    sr8.nG ~ mcu.oe_n
    sr9.nG ~ mcu.oe_n
    sr10.nG ~ mcu.oe_n
    sr11.nG ~ mcu.oe_n
    sr12.nG ~ mcu.oe_n
    sr1.VCC ~ v3v3.hv
    sr2.VCC ~ v3v3.hv
    sr3.VCC ~ v3v3.hv
    sr4.VCC ~ v3v3.hv
    sr5.VCC ~ v3v3.hv
    sr6.VCC ~ v3v3.hv
    sr7.VCC ~ v3v3.hv
    sr8.VCC ~ v3v3.hv
    sr9.VCC ~ v3v3.hv
    sr10.VCC ~ v3v3.hv
    sr11.VCC ~ v3v3.hv
    sr12.VCC ~ v3v3.hv
    sr1.GND ~ v3v3.lv
    sr2.GND ~ v3v3.lv
    sr3.GND ~ v3v3.lv
    sr4.GND ~ v3v3.lv
    sr5.GND ~ v3v3.lv
    sr6.GND ~ v3v3.lv
    sr7.GND ~ v3v3.lv
    sr8.GND ~ v3v3.lv
    sr9.GND ~ v3v3.lv
    sr10.GND ~ v3v3.lv
    sr11.GND ~ v3v3.lv
    sr12.GND ~ v3v3.lv
    sr1.nSRCLR ~ v3v3.hv
    sr2.nSRCLR ~ v3v3.hv
    sr3.nSRCLR ~ v3v3.hv
    sr4.nSRCLR ~ v3v3.hv
    sr5.nSRCLR ~ v3v3.hv
    sr6.nSRCLR ~ v3v3.hv
    sr7.nSRCLR ~ v3v3.hv
    sr8.nSRCLR ~ v3v3.hv
    sr9.nSRCLR ~ v3v3.hv
    sr10.nSRCLR ~ v3v3.hv
    sr11.nSRCLR ~ v3v3.hv
    sr12.nSRCLR ~ v3v3.hv

    # coil sink channel map (chain order; firmware shares this table)
    sr1.DRAIN0 ~ drain1
    sr1.DRAIN1 ~ drain2
    sr1.DRAIN2 ~ drain3
    sr1.DRAIN3 ~ drain4
    sr1.DRAIN4 ~ drain5
    sr1.DRAIN5 ~ drain6
    sr1.DRAIN6 ~ drain7
    sr1.DRAIN7 ~ drain8
    sr2.DRAIN0 ~ drain9
    sr2.DRAIN1 ~ drain10
    sr2.DRAIN2 ~ drain11
    sr2.DRAIN3 ~ drain12
    sr2.DRAIN4 ~ drain13
    sr2.DRAIN5 ~ drain14
    sr2.DRAIN6 ~ drain15
    sr2.DRAIN7 ~ drain16
    sr3.DRAIN0 ~ drain17
    sr3.DRAIN1 ~ drain18
    sr3.DRAIN2 ~ drain19
    sr3.DRAIN3 ~ drain20
    sr3.DRAIN4 ~ drain21
    sr3.DRAIN5 ~ drain22
    sr3.DRAIN6 ~ drain23
    sr3.DRAIN7 ~ drain24
    sr4.DRAIN0 ~ drain25
    sr4.DRAIN1 ~ drain26
    sr4.DRAIN2 ~ drain27
    sr4.DRAIN3 ~ drain28
    sr4.DRAIN4 ~ drain29
    sr4.DRAIN5 ~ drain30
    sr4.DRAIN6 ~ drain31
    sr4.DRAIN7 ~ drain32
    sr5.DRAIN0 ~ drain33

    sr8.DRAIN0 ~ drain57

name: power.ato
content:
"""
PowerTree — 24V control power in, relay coil rail, logic rails.
Real parts (verified generated pinouts):
  TPS54331DR (24V->5V buck), TPS62086RLTR (5V->3V3 dig buck),
  TPS7A4901DGNR (5V->3V3 ana LDO), INA219AIDCNR (coil telemetry),
  SMBJ33A input TVS, stdlib Fuse (24V-rated PPTC, solver-picked).
Support passives are functional essentials (inductors, boot cap,
feedback dividers); compensation networks (COMP/SS/NR) are noted TODO
for the analog review before fab.
"""

import ElectricPower
import Resistor
import Capacitor
import Inductor
import Fuse
from "parts/Texas_Instruments_TPS54331DR/Texas_Instruments_TPS54331DR.ato" import Texas_Instruments_TPS54331DR_package
from "parts/Texas_Instruments_TPS62086RLTR/Texas_Instruments_TPS62086RLTR.ato" import Texas_Instruments_TPS62086RLTR_package
from "parts/Texas_Instruments_TPS7A4901DGNR/Texas_Instruments_TPS7A4901DGNR.ato" import Texas_Instruments_TPS7A4901DGNR_package
from "parts/Texas_Instruments_INA219AIDCNR/Texas_Instruments_INA219AIDCNR.ato" import Texas_Instruments_INA219AIDCNR_package
from "parts/Littelfuse_SMBJ33A/Littelfuse_SMBJ33A.ato" import Littelfuse_SMBJ33A_package


module PowerTree:
    v24 = new ElectricPower
    v5_coil = new ElectricPower
    v3v3_dig = new ElectricPower
    v3v3_ana = new ElectricPower
    signal sda
    signal scl

    fuse = new Fuse
    fuse.trip_current = 2A +/- 20%

    tvs = new Littelfuse_SMBJ33A_package
    buck24 = new Texas_Instruments_TPS54331DR_package
    buck5 = new Texas_Instruments_TPS62086RLTR_package
    ldo_ana = new Texas_Instruments_TPS7A4901DGNR_package
    coil_mon = new Texas_Instruments_INA219AIDCNR_package

    shunt = new Resistor
    shunt.resistance = 0.05ohm +/- 1%

    # 24V entry: fuse + TVS clamp
    v24.hv ~ fuse.unnamed[0]
    fuse.unnamed[1] ~ tvs.C
    tvs.A ~ v24.lv

    # 24V -> 5V buck: TPS54331 (VIN 2, GND 7, EN 3, PH 8, BOOT 1, VSENSE 5)
    fuse.unnamed[1] ~ buck24.VIN
    buck24.GND ~ v24.lv
    buck24.EN ~ buck24.VIN
    l_buck24 = new Inductor
    l_buck24.inductance = 10uH +/- 20%
    c_boot = new Capacitor
    c_boot.capacitance = 100nF +/- 10%
    buck24.BOOT ~ c_boot.unnamed[0]
    c_boot.unnamed[1] ~ buck24.PH
    buck24.PH ~ l_buck24.unnamed[0]
    signal v5_raw
    l_buck24.unnamed[1] ~ v5_raw
    # feedback: 0.8V ref, 5V out -> 10.5k / 2k
    fb24_top = new Resistor
    fb24_top.resistance = 10.5kohm +/- 1%
    fb24_bot = new Resistor
    fb24_bot.resistance = 2kohm +/- 1%
    v5_raw ~ fb24_top.unnamed[0]
    fb24_top.unnamed[1] ~ buck24.VSENSE
    buck24.VSENSE ~ fb24_bot.unnamed[0]
    fb24_bot.unnamed[1] ~ v24.lv
    # TODO analog review: COMP RC + SS cap values before fab

    # coil rail through the telemetry shunt
    v5_raw ~ shunt.unnamed[0]
    shunt.unnamed[1] ~ v5_coil.hv
    coil_mon.INpos ~ shunt.unnamed[0]
    coil_mon.INneg ~ shunt.unnamed[1]
    coil_mon.VS ~ v3v3_dig.hv
    coil_mon.GND ~ v24.lv
    coil_mon.SDA ~ sda
    coil_mon.SCL ~ scl
    coil_mon.A0 ~ v24.lv
    coil_mon.A1 ~ v24.lv

    # 5V -> 3V3 dig buck: TPS62086 (VIN 7, GND 5, SW 6, FB 3, EN 1, VOS 4)
    v5_raw ~ buck5.VIN
    buck5.GND ~ v24.lv
    buck5.EN ~ buck5.VIN
    l_buck5 = new Inductor
    l_buck5.inductance = 2.2uH +/- 20%
    buck5.SW ~ l_buck5.unnamed[0]
    l_buck5.unnamed[1] ~ v3v3_dig.hv
    buck5.VOS ~ v3v3_dig.hv
    # feedback: 0.45V ref, 3.3V out -> 100k / 15.8k
    fb5_top = new Resistor
    fb5_top.resistance = 100kohm +/- 1%
    fb5_bot = new Resistor
    fb5_bot.resistance = 15.8kohm +/- 1%
    v3v3_dig.hv ~ fb5_top.unnamed[0]
    fb5_top.unnamed[1] ~ buck5.FB
    buck5.FB ~ fb5_bot.unnamed[0]
    fb5_bot.unnamed[1] ~ v24.lv

    # 5V -> 3V3 ana LDO: TPS7A4901 (IN 8, GND 4, OUT 1, FB 2, EN 5, NR 6)
    v5_raw ~ ldo_ana.IN
    ldo_ana.GND ~ v24.lv
    ldo_ana.EN ~ ldo_ana.IN
    ldo_ana.OUT ~ v3v3_ana.hv
    # feedback: 1.194V ref, 3.3V out -> 35.7k / 20.5k
    fbl_top = new Resistor
    fbl_top.resistance = 35.7kohm +/- 1%
    fbl_bot = new Resistor
    fbl_bot.resistance = 20.5kohm +/- 1%
    v3v3_ana.hv ~ fbl_top.unnamed[0]
    fbl_top.unnamed[1] ~ ldo_ana.FB
    ldo_ana.FB ~ fbl_bot.unnamed[0]
    fbl_bot.unnamed[1] ~ v24.lv
    c_nr = new Capacitor
    c_nr.capacitance = 10nF +/- 10%
    ldo_ana.NR_SS ~ c_nr.unnamed[0]
    c_nr.unnamed[1] ~ v24.lv

    v5_coil.lv ~ v24.lv
    v3v3_dig.lv ~ v24.lv
    v3v3_ana.lv ~ v24.lv

name: protection.ato
content:
"""
Protection — per-probe chain, in order from the tip
(relay-probe-matrix-rev-a.md section 3). Real parts:
- BAV99,215 steering pair (SOT-23: pin3 = center K1+A2 = node;
  pin2 = K2 -> clamp+; pin1 = A1 -> clamp-)
- SMAJ24CA bidirectional TVS on each node
- TLV3502AIDR dual comparator as the pre-connect window check
- stdlib Fuse as the 50 mA resettable PTC
"""

import ElectricPower
import Resistor
import Fuse
from "parts/PAN_CHANG_SIP_1A05/PAN_CHANG_SIP_1A05.ato" import PAN_CHANG_SIP_1A05_package
from "parts/Nexperia_BAV99_215/Nexperia_BAV99_215.ato" import Nexperia_BAV99_215_package
from "parts/Littelfuse_SMAJ24CA/Littelfuse_SMAJ24CA.ato" import Littelfuse_SMAJ24CA_package
from "parts/Texas_Instruments_TLV3502AIDR/Texas_Instruments_TLV3502AIDR.ato" import Texas_Instruments_TLV3502AIDR_package
from "parts/Littelfuse_0805L010YR/Littelfuse_0805L010YR.ato" import Littelfuse_0805L010YR_package





module ProbeProtection:
    """One channel; instantiated 8x in main."""
    signal tip          # from cartridge connector
    signal node         # to LaneSelector.probe
    signal vcheck_hi    # to MCU GPIO
    signal vcheck_lo
    clamp_p = new ElectricPower  # +15V clamp rail (source TBD)
    clamp_n = new ElectricPower  # -15V clamp rail (source TBD)
    v3v3 = new ElectricPower

    # 0805L010YR: 100 mA hold / 0.25 A trip — Rev A substitute for the
    # spec'd 50 mA hold (closest stocked 0805 PPTC); revisit at analog review
    ptc = new Littelfuse_0805L010YR_package

    steer = new Nexperia_BAV99_215_package
    tvs = new Littelfuse_SMAJ24CA_package
    comp = new Texas_Instruments_TLV3502AIDR_package

    rdiv_top = new Resistor
    rdiv_top.resistance = 1Mohm +/- 1%
    rdiv_bot = new Resistor
    rdiv_bot.resistance = 100kohm +/- 1%

    tip ~ ptc.p1
    ptc.p2 ~ node
    node ~ steer.node
    steer.clamp_p ~ clamp_p.hv
    steer.clamp_n ~ clamp_n.hv
    node ~ tvs.p1
    tvs.p2 ~ v3v3.lv

    # divider -> both comparator inputs (window thresholds set by shared
    # reference chain; values at analog review)
    node ~ rdiv_top.unnamed[0]
    rdiv_top.unnamed[1] ~ comp.IN_Apos
    comp.IN_Apos ~ comp.IN_Bneg
    comp.IN_Apos ~ rdiv_bot.unnamed[0]
    rdiv_bot.unnamed[1] ~ v3v3.lv
    comp.Vpos ~ v3v3.hv
    comp.Vneg ~ v3v3.lv
    comp.OUTA ~ vcheck_hi
    comp.OUTB ~ vcheck_lo


module ReferenceBlock:
    """Cal references behind dedicated reeds: 0.01%-class 1k, 100k,
    dead short — routable onto DMM_HI for self-test (section 5)."""
    signal ref_bus
    v3v3 = new ElectricPower
    coil_bus = new ElectricPower

    r1k = new Resistor
    r1k.resistance = 1kohm +/- 0.1%
    r100k = new Resistor
    r100k.resistance = 100kohm +/- 0.1%

    k_1k = new PAN_CHANG_SIP_1A05_package
    k_100k = new PAN_CHANG_SIP_1A05_package
    k_short = new PAN_CHANG_SIP_1A05_package

    k_1k.coil_p ~ coil_bus.hv
    k_100k.coil_p ~ coil_bus.hv
    k_short.coil_p ~ coil_bus.hv
    signal sink_1k
    signal sink_100k
    signal sink_short
    k_1k.coil_n ~ sink_1k
    k_100k.coil_n ~ sink_100k
    k_short.coil_n ~ sink_short

    ref_bus ~ k_1k.com
    k_1k.no ~ r1k.unnamed[0]
    r1k.unnamed[1] ~ v3v3.lv
    ref_bus ~ k_100k.com
    k_100k.no ~ r100k.unnamed[0]
    r100k.unnamed[1] ~ v3v3.lv
    ref_bus ~ k_short.com
    k_short.no ~ v3v3.lv
